title: The reason you want a Ferrari is why you don't have one
description:
*🚀 Master Quantitative Skills with Quant Guild*
https://quantguild.com

*📈 Interactive Brokers for Algorithmic Trading*
https://www.interactivebrokers.com/mkt/?src=quantguildY&url=%2Fen%2Fwhyib%2Foverview.php

*⚔ Play the Markets like an RPG*
https://discourses.io

👾 Join the Quant Guild Discord server here
https://discord.com/invite/MJ4FU2c6c3
___________________________________________
*🪐 Quant Guild Library*
https://github.com/romanmichaelpaolucci/Quant-Guild-Library/tree/main

Are you really going to subscribe to someone else's arbitrary metrics for "success"?  It's a moving goalpost, and someone is always going to be mad at you for SOMETHING.  Just do the thing...

I hope you enjoyed, and I hope you learned something!

- Roman
___________________________________________
*📖 Chapters:*
00:00 - The Ferrari Paradox
01:08 - Reality of High Finance
02:04 - Shifting to Excellence
03:05 - Blowout Factor
04:47 - Just Do The Thing
06:33 - My 90% Pay Cut
08:11 - Real Success
___________________________________________
